The '''Kagles''' were a trio of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], brown-furred brothers who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They were distinguished by their differently [[Color/Legends|colored]] shirts: [[Unidentified Kagle (blue shirt)|one in blue]], [[Unidentified Kagle (green shirt)|one in green]], and [[Unidentified Kagle (yellow shirt)|one in yellow]]. They lived near [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] and the home of [[Larry]] the [[Larry|Shriek]]. The Kagles enjoyed [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
It is not known whether ''Kagle'' is the name of their [[Species/Legends|species]] or their family.
